hero.description: LYNX AI Agency is the first agency in Spain specializing in Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and Local SEO. When someone asks ChatGPT about your industry, AI recommends whoever has the right content. We make that someone be you.

services_overview.title: Two services. One goal: get found.
services_overview.desc: Local SEO captures users searching Google Maps right now. GEO captures those asking AI before deciding. Together, they cover 100% of how customers discover businesses today.
services_overview.geo_desc: We make ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity recommend your business when someone asks about your industry.
services_overview.seo_desc: You appear first when someone nearby searches for your service on Google Maps or geolocated searches.

methodology.title: LYNX GEO Framework™
methodology.desc: A methodology based on how LLMs retrieve information via RAG. Not classic SEO — pure GEO.

steps.title: AI Audit
steps.desc: We test your business across 20+ prompts on all 4 AI engines. We measure where you stand now.

steps.title: Architecture
steps.desc: Schema Markup and entity structure so AI can identify and cite you.

steps.title: RAG-Ready Content
steps.desc: We rewrite your content as citable fragments: concrete data, direct answers.

steps.title: Prompt Tracking
steps.desc: Every 15 days we measure if you appear, your position, and what arguments are cited.

case_teaser.title: From invisible to #1 on ChatGPT in 90 days
case_teaser.desc: International nature tourism company. Competitive sector. Zero AI presence. We applied the full LYNX GEO Framework™.

cta_section.title: AI visibility audit.
cta_section.desc: We analyze your business across 4 AI engines and Google. We deliver a report showing what's failing and a concrete action plan.

servicios_page.title: GEO + Local SEO:
servicios_page.desc: LYNX AI Agency combines two complementary services: Local SEO for Google Maps and GEO for AI engines. Together they cover 100% of how customers discover businesses today.
servicios_page.geo_intro1: GEO is the SEO of AI engines. When someone asks ChatGPT «what company in [your industry] do you recommend in [your city]?», AI responds with whoever has the right structured content. That someone has to be you.
servicios_page.geo_intro2: LLMs don't read web pages top to bottom. They retrieve specific text fragments (RAG). LYNX structures every page as a citable fragment.

geo_items.title: AI Visibility Audit
geo_items.desc: We test your business on ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity across 20+ prompts in your sector. Establishes the baseline.

geo_items.title: RAG-Ready Content
geo_items.desc: We rewrite key pages as self-contained fragments with quantifiable data that LLMs can retrieve and cite.

geo_items.title: Schema Markup (JSON-LD)
geo_items.desc: We implement structured data: Organization, LocalBusiness, FAQPage, Review, Service. AI needs structure to understand you.

geo_items.title: Authority Pages
geo_items.desc: We create pages dedicated to your unique differentiators: data no one else can replicate.

geo_items.title: Monthly Prompt Tracking
geo_items.desc: Every 15 days we run the same prompts across 4 engines. We measure if you appear, position, and cited arguments.

geo_items.title: AI Positioning Reports
geo_items.desc: Monthly report with evolution on ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, and Google AI Overview.

servicios_page.seo_intro1: 46% of Google searches have local intent. When someone searches «[your service] near me», Google shows the Local Pack — the 3 businesses on the map. Being there multiplies calls and direct visits.
servicios_page.seo_intro2: Google weighs three factors: Relevance (what you do), Distance (where you are), and Prominence (how well-known you are). LYNX optimizes all three.

seo_items.title: Google Business Profile
seo_items.desc: Complete profile optimization: categories, attributes, photos, hours, periodic posts, and Q&A management.

seo_items.title: Local Authority
seo_items.desc: Reviews strategy, responses, and local reputation signal building to improve the Prominence factor.

seo_items.title: Local Citations (NAP)
seo_items.desc: Building and cleaning citations in relevant directories. NAP consistency (Name, Address, Phone) across the web.

seo_items.title: Technical Web Audit
seo_items.desc: Speed, mobile-first, Core Web Vitals, URL structure, canonicals. Technical issues also affect local ranking.

seo_items.title: Geolocated Positioning
seo_items.desc: Local content strategy targeting specific neighborhoods, cities, and catchment areas.

seo_items.title: Local On-Page Optimization
seo_items.desc: H1, title tags, meta descriptions, and content optimized for local intent searches.

servicios_page.cta_desc: Initial audit for €50. We analyze your Google presence and 4 AI engines and tell you exactly what's missing.

casos_page.title: From invisible to #1 on ChatGPT
casos_page.desc: International nature tourism company in Central America. Competitive sector. Zero AI presence. LYNX AI Agency applied the full LYNX GEO Framework™.
casos_page.context_title: The client was invisible to AI
casos_page.context_desc1: The company had an excellent product — immersive jungle tours, certified guides, unique experiences. But when someone asked ChatGPT or Perplexity about agencies in their sector, the client didn't appear in any response.
casos_page.context_desc2: The problem wasn't the product. It was the content: written to convince people, not to be cited by LLMs. No quantifiable data, no Schema Markup, no verifiable entities.
casos_page.prompt_label: The same prompt launched every 15 days across 4 engines:
casos_page.prompt_text: «I'm looking for an ecotourism agency in [destination] with certified guides and immersive tours. Who do you recommend and why?»
casos_page.timeline_title: 90 days of work with the LYNX GEO Framework™

timeline.label: Week 1–2
timeline.title: AI Visibility Audit
timeline.desc: We tested 18 key prompts on ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity. The client didn't appear on either of the first two engines. Only 2nd place on Gemini for one prompt.

timeline.label: Week 2–4
timeline.title: Entity Architecture
timeline.desc: We implemented complete Schema Markup: Organization, LocalBusiness, TouristAttraction, FAQPage. The site had zero structured data.

timeline.label: Week 3–6
timeline.title: RAG-Ready Rewrite
timeline.desc: We rewrote the homepage, tour pages, and created 3 new authority pages. From generic content to fragments with quantifiable data and unique differentiators.

timeline.label: Month 2
timeline.title: Authority Signals
timeline.desc: Active review strategy. Co-founder authority page as an author entity with verifiable certifications.

timeline.label: Month 3
timeline.title: First Prompt Tracking
timeline.desc: At 30 days: ChatGPT starts mentioning the client. At 60 days: first place on ChatGPT for the main KPI prompt.

timeline.label: Month 3
timeline.title: Consolidation
timeline.desc: 90 days: 12+ prompts positioned. Google AI Overview also cites the client. 3 of 3 engines covered.

casos_page.testimonial: LYNX AI Agency took our business from being completely invisible to AI assistants to becoming the #1 recommendation on ChatGPT for our key search terms in 90 days. Their prompt tracking system showed us exactly how our visibility was improving.
casos_page.cta_title: Is your business invisible to AI?
casos_page.cta_desc: The first step is the audit: €50 and we tell you where you stand and what needs to be done.

pricing_page.title: Investment with measurable
pricing_page.desc: No hidden fees. No surprises. One setup price, a monthly fee, and a minimum 3-month contract to complete the results cycle.
pricing_page.audit_desc: No commitment. We deliver a complete diagnosis of your Google and 4 AI engine presence with a concrete action plan.
audit_items: Gap report vs. competitors in AI
pricing_page.contract_note: Minimum 3-month contract · Visible results in 60–90 days · Prices excl. VAT

faqs.a: Setup is invoiced at the start of the contract. The monthly fee begins in the second month.

faqs.q: What if I want to cancel before 3 months?
faqs.a: The minimum 3-month contract guarantees the full results cycle. Early cancellations are handled per the signed contract.
No. All listed prices are exclusive of VAT. Applicable VAT (21%) is added to the invoice.

faqs.q: Can I start with just the audit?
faqs.a: Yes. The €50 audit is a standalone service. After receiving it, you decide whether to continue with the full service.

faqs.q: When will I see first results?
faqs.a: First signs of improvement are usually seen in month 2 prompt tracking. Consolidated results arrive in 60–90 days, which is why the minimum contract is 3 months.

footer.tagline: Either you appear in AI, or you don't exist.
